Üsküdar University Advertising Workshop is designed as a workspace open to all students of the University, especially students of the Department of Advertising Design and Communication.

The workshop is a fun practice unit that provides an environment to reveal and develop creativity and share ideas.

Purpose of the Advertising Workshop

Within the scope of the workshop practices, students have the opportunity to demonstrate their theoretical knowledge of advertising design in a practical way. In the workshop, which continues to work in the concept of advertising agency, students take an active role in creative processes such as ad text writing, brief writing, 360-degree campaign design, examining advertising types. The workshop aims to transform creative ideas into practices such as posters, logos and commercials.

Opportunities of the Advertising Workshop for Students

The Advertising Workshop has all the necessary equipment for students to participate in projects, events and competitions. In the workshop, which is also active outside the class period, students come together with their department professors and exchange ideas. At the same time, students have the opportunity to closely monitor and evaluate the developments in the advertising industry.
